results.title: Modeling agricultural production risk and the adaptation to climate change
results.abstract: <jats:p>An approach that integrates biophysical simulations in an economic model is used to analyze the impact of climate change on Swiss corn and winter wheat production. Adaptation options such as changes in sowing dates, changes in production intensity, and the adoption of irrigation farming are considered in the model.
